---
title: "A note about graphical representation to capture the consumer's perception of a brand"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2010-06-10"
categories:
  - "Visualization"
  - "Publications"
---

Finally, [my article](2009-02-27-analisis-de-correspondencias-en-marketing.qmd) about correspondence analysis in marketing research has been published in the [Journal of Interdisciplinary Mathematics](http://www.connectjournals.com/toc2.php?abstract=377701H_jim326_17-40_abs.pdf&&bookmark=CJ-003060&&issue_id=01&&yaer=)… Here is the abstract: The draft of the paper can be downloaded by [clicking here](http://predictive.files.wordpress.com/2008/12/jim326.pdf). Full text is available after purchase by [clicking here](http://www.connectjournals.com/toc2.php?abstract=377701H_jim326_17-40_abs.pdf&&bookmark=CJ-003060&&issue_id=01&&yaer=).
